name: Garry Nolan
summary: Stanford pathology professor and Sol Foundation cofounder whose scientific work and public commentary have influenced modern UAP research.
profileSummary: Stanford pathology professor and Sol Foundation cofounder whose scientific work and public commentary have influenced modern UAP research.
background: Rachford and Carlota A. Harris Professor in Stanford University's Department of Pathology.
inclusionNote: Included because of his academic credentials, scientific research, Sol Foundation leadership, and involvement in evidence-focused UAP discussion.
